name: boundary
description: Define what is inside, outside, and crossing a system boundary for a validated problem.

purpose.problem: Define what is inside, outside, and crossing a system boundary for a validated problem.
purpose.outcome: Produce validated SystemBoundary, InScopeElements, OutOfScopeElements, BoundaryAssumptions.

thinkingHabit: Make scope choices and boundary assumptions explicit before reasoning about a system.

validation.description: Required inputs must be present, relevant, and mutually consistent.
validation.condition: required inputs pass the shared validation framework
validation.onFailure: Return needs clarification with one prioritized question.

validation.description: Material ambiguity and missing information must be surfaced.
validation.onFailure: Record the gap and stop dependent logic.

validation.description: Inputs must satisfy registered dependency semantics.
validation.condition: dependency outputs or validated equivalents are available

logic.description: Identify and normalize the skill's thinking elements: SystemBoundary, InScopeElement, OutOfScopeElement, Interface, Stakeholder.
logic.condition: each required element has evidence or explicit unknown status
logic.onFailure: Request or record the missing element.

logic.description: Apply the Boundary relationship rules without introducing platform assumptions.
Test contradictions, alternatives, and failure conditions.
logic.onFailure: Reduce confidence and disclose the limitation.

logic.description: Generate a schema-compatible evaluation and next-step recommendation.
logic.condition: scores, reasoning, and transition are consistent

criteria.name: ScopeClarity Score
criteria.description: Quality of scopeclarity in the current reasoning.

criteria.name: InterfaceCoverage Score
criteria.description: Quality of interfacecoverage in the current reasoning.

criteria.name: StakeholderFit Score
criteria.description: Quality of stakeholderfit in the current reasoning.

criteria.name: AssumptionTransparency Score
criteria.description: Quality of assumptiontransparency in the current reasoning.

criteria.name: Usefulness Score
criteria.description: Quality of usefulness in the current reasoning.

conversationRules: Ask one material question at a time.
Explain why a clarification affects the evaluation.
neverRules: Never bypass a blocking validation failure.
Never hide uncertainty behind a score.
Never invoke an unsatisfied downstream skill.

nextSkill.condition: The current output satisfies the registered transition contract.
The current output satisfies the registered transition contract.
